## Bug Description
A clear description of the defect.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run suite `...`
2. With env `...`
3. See failure

What should happen.

## Actual Behaviour
What actually happens. Paste the failure message here.

- Branch: `main`

## Allure / Extent Report Link
Paste the CI run URL or attach the report.
